name: modernize-php-class

assertions.description: Uses readonly class or readonly properties (PHP 8.2)

name: configure-phpstan-level9
prompt: Configure PHPStan for a PHP project. The project has source code in src/ and tests in tests/. Show me the phpstan.neon configuration.

assertions.description: Configures PHPStan at level 9 or higher
Disables trusting PHPDoc types over runtime

name: add-strict-types

assertions.description: Adds strict_types declaration as first statement

name: constants-to-enum

assertions.description: Converts class constants to a backed enum
Uses enum cases instead of class constants
Uses match expression instead of switch

name: array-to-dto

assertions.description: Creates a DTO class instead of returning arrays

name: configure-rector
prompt: Create a Rector configuration for a PHP 8.3 project with src/ and tests/ directories. Include code quality, dead code removal, and type declaration rules.

assertions.description: Uses LevelSetList for PHP version upgrades

name: configure-php-cs-fixer
prompt: Create a PHP-CS-Fixer configuration for a modern PHP project. The code is in src/ and tests/ directories.

name: switch-to-match

assertions.description: Uses match expression instead of switch
Uses arrow syntax in match expression

name: readonly-properties

assertions.description: Applies readonly modifier to promoted properties

name: psr-interface-typehint

assertions.description: Type-hints against PSR HTTP interface instead of Guzzle concrete
Type-hints against PSR-3 LoggerInterface instead of Monolog
Type-hints against PSR cache interface instead of Redis adapter

name: type-safe-collection
prompt: Create a type-safe PHP collection class for User objects that supports iteration and counting. Use modern PHP 8.1+ features and PHPDoc generics.

assertions.description: Uses PHPDoc generic annotations for type safety

name: value-object-pattern
prompt: Create a type-safe Email value object in PHP 8.2+ that validates the email format, is immutable, and supports equality comparison.

assertions.description: Uses private constructor or private property for controlled instantiation

name: phpstan-baseline-strategy
prompt: Our project has 200+ PHPStan errors at level 9. What is the recommended strategy to adopt PHPStan level 9 without fixing all errors at once?

assertions.description: Explains how to generate and use baseline

name: migration-assessment
prompt: We have a PHP 7.4 project and want to upgrade to PHP 8.2. What steps should we follow and what tools should we use?

name: nullsafe-operator
named-arguments

assertions.description: Uses named arguments for setcookie parameters

name: sensitive-parameter-attribute
override-attribute
composer-scripts-qa
prompt: Set up composer.json scripts section for a PHP project quality assurance pipeline with PHP-CS-Fixer, PHPStan, and Rector.

name: typed-class-constants
phpat-architecture-test
prompt: Create a PHPat architecture test that ensures the Domain layer does not depend on Infrastructure, and that DTOs are final and readonly.

assertions.description: Uses PHPat Selector for class matching
